mapper.select: select count(maxId) from( select max(id) as maxId from message where from_id != 1 and status != 2 and (to_id = #{userId} or from_id = ${userId}) group by conversation_id ) as tmp

select id, from_id, to_id, conversation_id, content, status, create_time from message where id in ( select max(id) as maxId from message where from_id != 1 and status != 2 and (to_id = #{userId} or from_id = #{userId}) group by conversation_id ) order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select count(id) from message where from_id != 1 and status !=2 and conversation_id = #{conversationId}
